faithfulness.description: Measures whether the answer is grounded in the retrieved context. At 0.70 we tolerate minor paraphrasing/synthesis but catch outright hallucinations. +10% (0.80) would fail on valid creative synthesis. -10% (0.60) would allow partially hallucinated content through.

answer_relevancy.description: Measures whether the answer addresses the user's question. Research questions are broad; the agent may provide useful tangential context. +10% (0.75) too strict for exploratory queries. -10% (0.55) would allow off-topic responses through.
